_comment: Hand-curated layer. build_data.py merges live GitHub dates/stars/language into this. Edit freely; only repos listed here appear on the arc.

git-onboard.blurb: Where it started: a CLI that walks complete beginners through Git and GitHub, explaining every command in plain English.

shipexec-metrics-tracker.blurb: Automated daily warehouse shipping reports (Selenium + pandas + Excel).

Balatron.blurb: Autonomous Balatro agent: PPO policy + forward-simulating planner + heuristics, measured on a held-out fixed-seed harness.

Dolly.blurb: The earliest warehouse RL simulation — where the Dolly → Jack → Clark line began.
Dolly.metric: the seed of the RL thread

Jack.blurb: PPO + LSTM agent with temporal memory for warehouse scheduling; validated single-facility predecessor to Clark.

Clark.blurb: Foundation RL model for warehouse workforce scheduling — variable-shape transformer + LSTM (~18M params), 3-stage curriculum.

clark-mcp.blurb: Fully-local natural-language interface to the Clark agent — MCP server + offline hermes3 client.

ai-profile-builder.blurb: Full-stack team AI-profiling platform: 14 behavioral spectrums, 9 archetypes, React 19 + Supabase.

skillmatch-mcp.blurb: Job-fit analysis MCP: compares your resume + GitHub portfolio against a job description.

context-keeper.blurb: Durable, rationale-first project memory: decisions, constraints, and pipelines across sessions, in human-editable JSON.

llm-evals.blurb: Eval framework for LLM tools and agents — swappable executors and scorers, regression detection built in.

rag-pipeline.blurb: Fully-local document Q&A (llama.cpp + Llama 3.2 + nomic-embed), FastAPI front door.
rag-pipeline.metric: no cloud, no external vector DB

skein.blurb: Local-first observability for A2A multi-agent message flows — deterministic failure-cascade detection.

waveform-MCP.blurb: Gives Claude full control of Tracktion Waveform — compose, mix, master, render.

Conductor.blurb: Local automation platform with a web dashboard — Flask + Redis workers + APScheduler.

agentsync.blurb: Server-less multi-agent coordination: claims on a git branch, git push as compare-and-swap.

cambium.blurb: The knowledge lifecycle: distill finished work into memory, recall it anywhere, promote local → team → org by earned trust.

context-keeper-remote.blurb: Cloudflare Worker transport for context-keeper — D1-backed, Streamable HTTP.

agentsync-remote.blurb: Cloudflare Worker transport for agentsync — GitHub-backed, compare-and-swap over HTTP.

Xylem.blurb: The stack: memory + coordination + knowledge lifecycle for AI agents, with a one-install habit layer. Local-first, remote-capable.
Xylem.metric: 5 servers live on the official MCP registry

vanguard-web.blurb: TypeScript + Phaser 3 JRPG with a connected walkable world, sim-tuned combat, and pixel-art sprites.

shardfall.blurb: A tiny idle game — HTML5 canvas + Vite, all art & audio generated in code.
